HOW TO USE
🏀LOGGING SHOTS
Tap LOG, find your name, spin the drum to reflect how many shots you made out of 25, then lock it in.
🔥FIRE ROWS
You haven't missed a day this week — keep it going!
🏆CHAMPS SCREEN
Season leaders and weekly history — see who won each week.
📅SUNDAY
Rest day — enjoy the standings. Board resets Monday morning.
